tools.name: atg_health
tools.description: Check the local Agent Trust Gate gateway health.
tools.output: Local gateway health, request ID, client ID, and API-key-mode status.
tools.safety_note: Returns local gateway status only and never executes actions.

tools.name: atg_decide
tools.description: Request a pre-action trust decision for a stable action descriptor.
tools.output: ALLOW, BLOCK, or human-approval-required trust decision with risk and usage fields.
tools.safety_note: Returns a trust decision only and never executes the described action.

tools.name: atg_get_entitlement
tools.description: Read local client allowance, remaining usage, and upgrade-required signals.
tools.output: Local entitlement status. purchase_enabled, automatic_purchase_enabled, and billing_enabled are always false.
tools.safety_note: Reads local control signals only. It does not purchase usage, bill customers, process payments, or execute actions.

tools.name: atg_get_commercial_readiness
tools.description: Read local product, commercial MVP, and full-target planning readiness.
tools.output: Local readiness percentages, category evidence and gaps, missing capabilities, and next steps.
tools.safety_note: Planning snapshot only. It does not bill, process payments, enable automatic purchase, expose a public service, or execute actions.

tools.name: atg_create_approval_pack
tools.description: Create a local approval packet for an action.
tools.output: Approval packet and optional explicit local save status.
tools.safety_note: Creates local approval evidence only and never executes actions.

tools.name: atg_create_evidence_bundle
tools.description: Create a local evidence bundle from a human review record.
tools.output: Evidence bundle and optional explicit local save status.
tools.safety_note: Creates local evidence only and never executes actions.

safety_statement: These local MCP-style tool definitions return trust decisions and evidence only. They never execute actions or process payments.
